@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class OSLevel {
  - dAController: any
  + osLevel: number | undefined
  - initialize(): void
  + OSLevel(): number | undefined
}

class OSLevelDASpec

class OSLevelDAMockup

OSLevel *-- OSLevelDASpec
OSLevel *-- OSLevelDAMockup

OSLevelDASpec ..> OSLevelDAMockup : «use»
@enduml
